prompt: Design a fantasy castle surrounded under a dark sky
prompt_refined: Generate a scene featuring an ornate fantasy castle, similar in architectural style, intricate detail, and overall landscape composition to image 1. The castle should be situated on a verdant hill with waterfalls cascading into a serene lake, viewed through a decorative, gilded archway overgrown with lush foliage and vibrant flowers in the foreground, mirroring image 1. Crucially, the entire scene must be rendered under a dramatic, dark sky, replacing the bright, sunny atmosphere of image 1, to evoke a mysterious and imposing mood.
objects: Ornate fantasy castle on a verdant hill
Decorative, gilded archway in the foreground
Lush foliage overgrown on the archway and in the foreground
Vibrant flowers on the archway and in the foreground
Paved ground area in the foreground
Bright, sunny sky (should not be present)
